_doc: Agent registry — all callable agents in Nova. Any AI invokes via nova_agent_invoke <name> <args_json>. interpreter: internal (JS module) / python / node / custom binary. calling_convention: method_payload | raw_args.
_extending: Add your own agent under `agents` — see _example_python_agent for the schema. Drop the `_` prefix to enable.

memory-hygiene.description: Scan + repair memory library: delete test residue / heuristic + LLM module backfill / report anomalies. 12h cron auto dry-run.

_example_python_agent._comment: Example: registering a Python agent. Strip `_` prefix to enable.
